stemHtml: Flight OAL 136 has just departed Bern aerodrome, flying the MOLUS 4A RNAV departure, when it experiences a total electrical failure. The flight crew is flying with reference to its standby instruments in IMC. Select the option which constitutes a correct DISTRESS message to Bern Departure…

options.a: PAN PAN (x3), Bern Departure, OAL 136, unable RNAV due equipment, turning left heading 100 climbing to 7 000 ft.
options.b: MAYDAY, Bern Departure, OAL 136, unable RNAV due equipment, experiencing total electrical failure, turning left heading 100 climbing to 7 000 ft.
options.c: MAYDAY, MAYDAY, MAYDAY, OAL 136, turning left heading 100 climbing to 7 000 ft.
options.d: PAN PAN, PAN PAN, PAN PAN, OAL 136, unable RNAV due equipment, experiencing total electrical failure, turning left heading 100 climbing to 7 000 ft.
